name: Castell Coch & Fforest Fawr
dog_lead_policy: Off-lead in woods except near road
highlights: Red Dragon castle and the 'Peacock Stone' among ancient beech.
points_of_interest: Castell Coch (Cadw); Fforest Fawr iron age camp
viewpoints: Views of Cardiff from Caerphilly ridge
parking_start: Castell Coch car park (free) or forest layby
food_drink_nearby: Lewis Arms Tongwynlais; Castell Coch tea room
